title: mentha × villosa var. gillotii
intro: Mentha × villosa var. gillotii, also known as Gillott's mint or Moroccan mint, is a variety of mint plant that is native to North Africa and the Mediterranean region. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a digestive aid, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Mentha × villosa var. gillotii include its ability to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, reduce nausea and vomiting, and provide relief from headaches and fever. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be consumed or applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
